type: Sulphate of Potassium fertilizer (High potassium with sulphur)
mode_of_action_summary: Sulphate of Potassium provides essential potassium and sulphur to plants. Potassium improves fruit quality, enhances stress tolerance, and increases yield, while sulphur supports protein synthesis and enzyme activation, improving overall plant health.

active_ingredients.name: Potassium (K2O)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Improves fruit quality, stress tolerance, and plant strength

active_ingredients.name: Sulphur (S)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports protein synthesis and enzyme activation

application_details.method: Apply to soil or dissolve in water for irrigation
application_details.coverage: Ensure uniform application in root zone

farmer_benefits: پھل بڑا تے وزنی ہو جاندا اے
فصل دی کوالٹی بہتر ہوندی اے

multilingual_description.english: Sulphate of Potassium fertilizer for improving fruit quality and yield.
multilingual_description.urdu: سلفیٹ آف پوٹاش والی کھاد جو پھل کی کوالٹی اور پیداوار بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: سلفیٹ آف پوٹاش والی کھاد جو پھل دی کوالٹی تے پیداوار بہتر کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Major SOP P 50 18 is a sulphate of potassium fertilizer used to improve fruit quality plant strength and crop yield. It supplies potassium and sulphur essential for plant growth and development.
